title: Dashboard
resellerWelcomeDescription: Manage your institutes and team from here.
platformWelcomeDescription: Manage institutes, users, and platform settings from here.
manageInstitutesDescription: View, create, and manage all institutes on the platform.
manageUsersDescription: Manage platform users, roles, and permissions.
viewAuditLogsDescription: Review recent platform activity and changes.
instituteWelcomeDescription: Set up your institute by enrolling students, assigning teachers, and configuring standards.
emptyStudentsDescription: Enroll your first student to get started with attendance and fees.
emptyTeachersDescription: Add teachers and assign them to sections.
emptyStandardsDescription: Create standards and sections for your academic structure.
manageStandardsDescription: Create and organize academic standards and sections.
manageSubjectsDescription: Add subjects and assign them to standards.
